name: Varies
title: HL7 v2 Varies Data Type
description: Abstract data type indicating that the actual data type of the field is determined at runtime, typically by the value of another field in the same segment. For example, OBX-5 (Observation Value) has data type Varies because its actual type is specified by OBX-2 (Value Type). The allowed types and the mechanism for determining them are defined per field in the segment specification.

element.definition: A field whose data type is determined at runtime by another field. The actual value may be any V2 primitive or complex data type as specified by the controlling field.
